sys_script_include.description:
This script include will contain all of the Task table business rules
Currently there are too many Business rules on the task table. It is impacting performance and making it confusing to see the flow. Over the 2.7 through 3.2 releases we will move all of the business rules into this script include to clean up, streamline and simplify the rules associated with tasks being added.
sys_script_include.name: Task_Business_Rules
